summary: Provides details on how to log in to the ERP system, the structure of the dashboard, and the concept of permission-based interfaces and quick links.
steps: Log in using your phone number and OTP.
(Optional) Set a password after logging in.
View your company's PRT interface, entity name, user ID, institute name, and current session on the dashboard.
business_rules: Login is via phone number and OTP.
The interface is permission-based; users only see options relevant to their role (e.g., students see admission, fee clerks see fee options).
important_notes: The URL campus.audipay.org should be saved or attached to the homescreen.
Quick links can be customized by each user for frequently used options.
questions: How do I log in to the ERP system?
What is the URL for the ERP login?
Can I set a password for my ERP account?
How can I customize my quick links on the dashboard?
Why do I see different options than other users on the dashboard?
